articles.title: ‘Unethical’: Jaylen Brown slams ESPN, Stephen A. Smith in latest exchange of barbs
articles.description:
Smith and Brown have traded comments dating back to 2024, when Smith reported that an anonymous source said Brown's "I'm better than you" attitude affected his marketability.

The post ‘Unethical’: Jaylen Brown slams ESPN, Stephen A. Smith in latest exchange of barbs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown criticized ESPN and Stephen A. Smith for unethical reporting on June 24, 2026.
Brown's comments stem from a 2024 report about his marketability and attitude.
The exchange highlights ongoing tensions affecting Boston Celtics' public image and player relations.

articles.title: New York prepares for an event at Madison Square Garden. Clues point to you know who.
articles.description:
After weeks of speculation over Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding plans, a permit has been filed for an event at Madison Square Garden over the July 4 weekend.

The post New York prepares for an event at Madison Square Garden. Clues point to you know who. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding event planned for July 4 weekend at Madison Square Garden.
Permit filed indicates significant celebrity presence, affecting nearby Boston travel and accommodations.
Boston residents may experience increased demand for hotels and transportation during the holiday weekend.

articles.title: Review and setlist: The Strokes’ appeal isn’t ‘hard to explain’ even 20 years later
articles.description:
The indie rock band’s Tuesday night show at TD Garden marked its first Boston appearance in nearly two decades.

The post Review and setlist: The Strokes’ appeal isn’t ‘hard to explain’ even 20 years later appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Strokes performed at TD Garden on June 24, marking their first Boston show in 20 years.
The concert attracted a large crowd, showcasing the band's lasting appeal in the indie rock scene.
Local fans celebrated the band's return, enhancing Boston's vibrant music culture and community engagement.

articles.title: Davio’s Northern Italian Steakhouse to close Chestnut Hill restaurant
articles.description:
Davio’s Northern Italian Steakhouse will close June 28 after a change in ownership at the adjoining Showcase SuperLux property.

The post Davio’s Northern Italian Steakhouse to close Chestnut Hill restaurant appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Davio’s Northern Italian Steakhouse in Chestnut Hill will close on June 28.
Closure follows a change in ownership at the adjacent Showcase SuperLux property.
Local residents will lose a popular dining option in the Chestnut Hill area.

articles.title: National group alleges ‘anti-Muslim hate campaign’ in Newton
articles.description:
The response stems from a privately organized Eid al-Adha celebration held at Newton City Hall.

The post National group alleges ‘anti-Muslim hate campaign’ in Newton appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: National group claims anti-Muslim hate campaign following Eid al-Adha event at Newton City Hall.
Event organized privately sparked controversy, highlighting tensions in the community.
Local residents may face increased division and scrutiny over cultural celebrations.
